data.title: Planet Lunch News
Quantum Hash Fund strategically invests in MX Network
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Quantum Hash Foundation announced a strategic investment in MX Network to help it build a new generation of Web3 distributed computing power infrastructure.
The distributed computing power network project MX Network is incubated by the CoCo ecosystem and is committed to building a dual-currency architecture of COCO and MX, deployed on BNB Chain, and its test network is now online.

data.title: Japan's 40-year bond yield rose 32 basis points, the highest level since it was first issued in 2007
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that the yield on Japan's 40-year government bonds rose by 32 basis points, the highest level since its first issuance in 2007. (Jinshi)

data.title: EU markets regulator says crypto may cause ‘broader stability issues’ as market grows
data.description:
The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) has warned that crypto will increasingly threaten traditional financial markets’ stability as the industry grows and becomes more entwined with traditional finance players. “We cannot rule out that future sharp drops in crypto prices could have knock-on effects on our financial system,” ESMA’s executive director Natasha Cazenave said in an April 8 statement to the Economic and Monetary Affairs Committee. Cazenave noted, however, that crypto currently only accounts for 1% of global financial assets and is not yet significant enough to cause major “spillover effects” into traditional financial markets. She warned that interconnections between crypto and traditional markets are rapidly growing — particularly in the more crypto-friendly US — and called for closer monitoring
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/eu-markets-regulator-warns-crypto-may-bring-broader-stability-issues?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Vitalik Buterin envisions layer 1 evolution in keynote at ETHAsia 2025
data.description:
9-4-2025 – At the ETHAsia 2025 event, held as part of the vibrant 2025 Hong Kong Web3 Carnival, Vitalik Buterin, one of Ethereum’s visionary co-founders, took to the stage with a compelling keynote titled The Future of Ethereum L1. His address offered a deep dive into the possibilities awaiting Ethereum’s foundational Layer 1 (L1) network, [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/vitalik-buterin-envisions-layer-1-evolution-in-keynote-at-ethasia-2025/

data.title: Japanese 40-Year Bond Yield Reaches Record High
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the yield on Japan's 40-year government bonds increased by 32 basis points, reaching its highest level since the bonds were first issued in 2007.

data.title: Japanese Financial Authorities to Discuss Global Market Developments
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Japan's central bank, the Ministry of Finance, and the Financial Services Agency are set to convene a meeting today at 07:00 GMT (15:00 UTC+8) to discuss the international financial markets.

data.title: New York Bill Proposes Using Blockchain to Safeguard Election Results
data.description:
Assemblyman Clyde Vanel’s new proposal would evaluate how blockchain can secure voter records and election results.
source: https://decrypt.co/314057/new-york-bill-blockchain-safeguard-election-results

data.title: Binance Unveils 37th Spotlight Project: $RFC (RFindercoin) Joins Binance Alpha
data.description: Binance has officially announced the 37th batch of its Spotlight projects on Binance Alpha, selecting $RFC (RFindercoin) as the latest token to be featured.
